title: Japanese samurai hat
description: this is just adding a warrior helmet in the pumpkin style that has been renamed.
body:
---

### 🪖 Samurai Helmets Pack

This is my **first resource pack**, which adds a collection of custom **samurai-style warrior helmets** inspired by pumpkins.
It works best when used **together with OptiFine** (for CIT support).

---

### ⚔️ Features

* Added **8 Samurai Helmets** — craft them by **renaming a Pumpkin** to:

  ```
  Samurai 1
  Samurai 2
  Samurai 3
  ...
  Samurai 8
  ```
* Each helmet has a unique samurai-inspired design.
* Includes a **prototype Viking helmet**, which will be expanded in future updates.

---

### 🛠️ Future Plans

I plan to add:

* More **helmet variations**
* Additional **custom gear and decorative items**

---

### 💬 Feedback

Your feedback means a lot!
You can check out my post and share your thoughts here:
🔗 [https://x.com/Black_Bunny_303/status/1787531388344033605](https://x.com/Black_Bunny_303/status/1787531388344033605)

---
